stem:
The functions f and g are defined by the given equations, where x ≥ 0. Which of the following equations displays, as a constant or coefficient, the maximum value of the function it defines, where x ≥ 0 ?

I. f(x) = 18(1.25)^x + 41
II. g(x) = 9(0.73)^x
explanation: In f, the base 1.25 is greater than 1, so f increases without bound and has no maximum. In g, the base 0.73 is less than 1, so g decreases and reaches its maximum at x = 0, where g(0) = 9 — the coefficient shown. So only II displays its maximum value.
